---
title: "Tools"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
toc: false
description: "Discover curated tools and utilities for cybersecurity, development, cloud management, and IT operations recommended by chen.ist."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories, image]
  date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Interactive <span class="gr">Tools</span></h1>
    <p>Utilities and calculators to assist with technical tasks.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Security Tools</h2>
    <p class="sub">Evaluate and improve your security posture.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-key"></i><h3>Password Strength Checker</h3><p>Evaluate password strength against modern security standards and common attack techniques.</p><ul><li>Entropy calculation</li><li>Dictionary attack detection</li><li>Common pattern identification</li><li>Estimated cracking time</li></ul><a href="password-strength-checker.html" class="m-lk">Launch Tool</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-exclamation"></i><h3>Zero Trust Assessment</h3><p>Evaluate your organization's Zero Trust security maturity across multiple domains.</p><ul><li>Comprehensive questionnaire</li><li>Domain-specific scoring</li><li>Maturity measurement</li><li>Actionable recommendations</li></ul><a href="zero-trust-assessment.html" class="m-lk">Launch Tool</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-lock"></i><h3>SSL/TLS Certificate Inspector</h3><p>Analyze SSL/TLS certificates for security issues, expiration dates, and configuration problems.</p><ul><li>Certificate validation</li><li>Cipher suite analysis</li><li>Protocol version checking</li><li>Configuration recommendations</li></ul><a href="ssl-certificate-inspector.html" class="m-lk">Launch Tool</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Development Tools</h2>
    <p class="sub">Streamline your development workflow.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud-arrow-up"></i><h3>Cloud Cost Calculator</h3><p>Estimate and compare costs across different cloud providers based on your resource requirements.</p><ul><li>Multi-cloud comparison</li><li>Reserved instance analysis</li><li>Right-sizing recommendations</li><li>Cost projection</li></ul><a href="cloud-cost-calculator.html" class="m-lk">Launch Tool</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-braces"></i><h3>API Request Builder</h3><p>Construct, test, and debug API requests with an interactive interface for RESTful and GraphQL APIs.</p><ul><li>Request method selection</li><li>Header and parameter builder</li><li>Authentication support</li><li>Response visualization</li></ul><a href="api-request-builder.html" class="m-lk">Launch Tool</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-globe2"></i><h3>Security Headers Analyzer</h3><p>Check and evaluate HTTP security headers for websites and get recommendations for improvement.</p><ul><li>Header detection and validation</li><li>CSP analysis</li><li>Security scoring</li><li>Best practice recommendations</li></ul><a href="security-headers-analyzer.html" class="m-lk">Launch Tool</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Interactive Calculators</h2>
    <p class="sub">Quick calculations for networking and risk analysis.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i><h3>CIDR Subnet Calculator</h3><p>Calculate IP address ranges, subnet masks, and network information from CIDR notation.</p><a href="cidr-calculator.html" class="m-lk">Full Calculator</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-currency-dollar"></i><h3>Data Breach Cost Estimator</h3><p>Estimate the potential financial impact of a data breach based on industry, size, and data types.</p><a href="breach-cost-estimator.html" class="m-lk">Full Estimator</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Command-Line Tools</h2>
    <p class="sub">Download and install on your own infrastructure.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-terminal"></i><h3>CloudScan CLI</h3><p>Scan cloud environments for security misconfigurations and compliance issues. Multi-cloud support for AWS, Azure, and GCP.</p><code>$ cloudscan audit --provider aws --region us-east-1 --framework cis</code><br><br><a href="https://github.com/chenist/cloudscan" target="_blank" class="m-lk">GitHub</a>&ensp;<a href="downloads/cloudscan-cli-v1.2.0.zip" class="m-lk" download>Download v1.2.0</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-eye"></i><h3>SecretScan</h3><p>Detect and prevent secrets and sensitive information in code repositories. Pre-commit hook and CI/CD pipeline integration.</p><code>$ secretscan check --path ./src --exclude node_modules</code><br><br><a href="https://github.com/chenist/secretscan" target="_blank" class="m-lk">GitHub</a>&ensp;<a href="downloads/secretscan-v0.9.5.zip" class="m-lk" download>Download v0.9.5</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Need a custom tool?</h2>
    <p>We build bespoke security and infrastructure tools for organizations.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b">Talk to our team</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Open-source first &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Enterprise ready &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Custom integrations
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
